title: More RPG Classes - EnvironmentZ Compat
description: Datapack for Modpack Devs. This Datapack adds some of the More RPG Classes Armors  to the EnvironmentZ Tags.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Xr7LTOe1/images/1eeeebdd2919fdc36153401e39099c6bf313539f.png)

### 🚨Required Mods
- [EnvironmentZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmentz)

This optional datapack was mainly created for Modpack Devs. It adds some of the More RPG Classes armor-sets to the EnvironmentZ Mod Tags.

**The following armors gets added to the tags with this datapack:**
- [Berserker Class](https://modrinth.com/mod/berserker-rpg-class/settings/description)
- [Witcher](https://modrinth.com/project/witcher-rpg-class 'Title') (Ursine School Armor)
- [Archers Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers-expansion) (Tundra Hunter Armor)
